contents.value:
```protobuf
// Numeric:
double, float           // floating point
int32, int64            // variable-length signed
uint32, uint64          // variable-length unsigned
sint32, sint64          // efficient for negatives
fixed32, fixed64        // fixed-length unsigned
sfixed32, sfixed64      // fixed-length signed

// Other:
bool                    // true/false
string                  // UTF-8 text
bytes                   // raw bytes
```
**Scalar types** - choose based on value range and encoding efficiency.
